content.en:
The comprehension of the changes of the endless path is more difficult than the changes of the other paths, and it is many times more difficult.

After all, there is no reference for the Endless Dao, and there is no change in the Endless Dao between heaven and earth, which requires a little comprehension of oneself.

Fortunately, Ye Tian had mastered a lot of Dao Perfection Marks, so his own foundation was too deep, coupled with the fact that he had a medium Perfection Treasure Enlightenment Dao White Lotus and his own Dao affinity ability, so his speed of enlightenment was too fast.

With the passage of time, coupled with the supply of resources in the Blood War Capital, Ye Tian's progress was still not slow.

"I hope that I can comprehend the three billion changes of the Endless Way in the days of the bloody battle. "

Ye Tian said.

The years passed, and before you knew it, many eternal years had passed.

At this moment, the day when Ye Tian left the Blood War Capital was getting closer and closer, and many half-step perfect controllers were very excited, because if Ye Tian left, they would have the hope of hitting the first place on the Blood Battle List!

That's why they expected Ye Tian to leave.

However, the changes in the Endless Dao were also beyond Ye Tian's expectations, it was too difficult to comprehend, even with the assistance of the Medium Perfection Alien Treasure Enlightenment Dao Baolian, Ye Tian had only mastered two billion changes so far, and there was still a long way to go before the three or three billion changes.

"It's no wonder that many peak half-step perfect controllers can't hit the realm of perfect controllers. The strong people who can become the pinnacle half-step perfect controller are all geniuses among geniuses, with huge potential, and they have definitely mastered a lot of perfect paths, but in the end, they still can't break through, because it is too difficult for their own ways to perfect the way of perfection!"

Ye Tian muttered.

However, he still had confidence, after all, he had only cultivated the Endless Dao of Perception for tens of thousands of eternity.

In short, even with a medium-perfect treasure like the Enlightened White Lotus, if he wants to form the Infinite Dao Perfection Seal, he will probably need to exceed a million eternal years, so he can slowly cultivate in the future.

In the blink of an eye, another period of time has passed.

this day.

Ye Tian was finally leaving the Blood War Capital, because he had already cultivated here for 100,000 Eternal Years.

For the Blood War Capital, Ye Tian's departure has no impact on the Blood War Capital, after all, the Blood War Capital can only be regarded as a training institution for the major forces, so he will not care about the departure of a half-step perfect controller.

Not long after, Ye Tian left the Blood War Capital, passed through the Misty Serpent, and came to the outside world.

......

No Road Tower.

Ye Tian's copy body is back.

The ensuing years were quiet, and nothing seemed to happen.

And he also learned about the situation of the Ten Elements Ancestor of the Master, the Ten Elements Ancestor joined a force called the Ten Thousand Dragons Palace, which was slightly stronger than the Azure Pavilion, because the Ten Thousand Dragons Hall had six perfect controllers, and the strength was still good.

And the Ten Elements Ancestor also spent a lot of time and energy in order to join the Ten Thousand Dragons Palace, so he was lucky enough to join it.

Ye Tian also went to meet Shizun Shixing Ancestor, and also gave Shizun some resources to help him quickly improve his strength, this is what he can do, and Shizun will have to rely on himself in the future.

Moreover, the Ten Elements Ancestor has his own path to follow, and Ye Tian also has his own path to follow, and the two sides are no longer at the same level.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian used the information and intelligence of the Daoless Tower to find out a lot of creatures that were very likely to have perfect-level ancestral endowments.

So, Ye Tian sent the replica body to find these creatures, but some of them did not have a perfect-level ancestral endowment at all, and they were purely powerful.

But with the passage of time, Ye Tian still copied a lot of perfect-level ancestral endowments, and his own talent potential naturally skyrocketed.

Of course, in the process of searching for these perfect-level ancestral endowments, Ye Tian also encountered many crises, such as encountering a perfect controller creature with an extremely tyrannical temperament, and was directly killed by the other party.

However, the killing of the copied body has no effect on Ye Tian, and he can be copied again.

Therefore, Ye Tian has nothing to lose.

this day.

A number of high-level executives of the Wudao Tower opened a meeting.

An incomparably terrifying perfection-level master participated in this meeting, and the content of this meeting was to discuss a relatively important matter.

"Everyone, Shilongyuan is about to be opened, there is a kind of Hundred Desolation Golden Fruit that creates the Extreme, although there are no more than ten Hundred Desolation Golden Fruits born each time, but this is also a very precious Extreme Creation Thing, so we have to send some peak half-step perfect controllers to compete for the quota to enter Shilongyuan. "

"There are a total of eighteen places in Shi Longyuan, and many forces are competing for these eighteen places, and there are only ten peak half-step perfect controllers that our Daoless Tower can allow to be dispatched, but there are more than ten peak half-step perfect controllers of our Daoless Tower, which ten to send is a problem?"

"Otherwise, form a fighting battlefield with the Wudao Tower, let the peak half-step perfect controller who wants to go to fight and fight, and let the strongest ten go, otherwise if we set our own quota, many peak half-step perfect controllers will feel unfair!"

"What's unfair, some peak half-step perfect controllers are very powerful, but their potential is exhausted, and there is almost no hope of becoming perfect controllers, even if they are given a hundred desolate golden fruits, it will be a waste!"

"Let's let them learn, even if it's a waste, it's a waste, you can't give them no hope at all!"

"Well, then it's decided, and then notify all the peak half-step perfect controllers, as for the top half-step perfect controllers, don't notify them, there's no point in going, you can't get a place to enter Shilongyuan!"

"Okay, then let's decide!"

This brief meeting then ended.

......

Soon, Ye Tian received a summons from the high-level officials of the Wudao Tower.

"Shi Longyuan, the thing that made the extreme-Hundred Desolation Golden Fruit!"

Ye Tian was very interested in the Hundred Desolation Golden Fruit, after all, this was the ultimate thing!

Although he had absorbed a large amount of Extreme Essence Gold Liquid, it didn't mean that he didn't need other Extreme Creation Things.

The more things that are absorbed, the greater hope in the future is to become the half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Realm, and the greater the hope, the better it is.

Moreover, there are more extreme-making things to absorb, and the limit of the half-step perfect control of the body in the future Extreme Creation Realm is also higher.

For example, the limit of the body of some half-step perfect controllers of the Extreme Creation Realm is 80, while the limit of the control body of some half-step perfect controllers of the Extreme Creation Realm is 100, and this is the difference.

Therefore, Ye Tian also wanted to absorb and refine more Extreme Creation Things.

Therefore, he didn't want to let go of this opportunity.
